summary_en: 17,000 shares (1.90% of shares outstanding), ¥85.0M maximum, ToSTNeT-3 method on May 15, 2026 at ¥4,930/share. Settlement same day. Execution limited to single trading window; partial or full non-execution possible.
title_en: Notice of Treasury Share Acquisition via Off-Hours Matching Trade (ToSTNeT-3)
translation_en_brief: Masaru Corporation announced on May 14, 2026 the execution parameters for a treasury share acquisition previously authorized on May 13, 2026. The company will conduct a single off-hours matching trade (ToSTNeT-3) block purchase on May 15, 2026 at 8:45 a.m. JST at the May 14 closing price of ¥4,930 per share. The acquisition targets up to 17,000 shares (1.90% of issued shares excluding treasury stock) with a maximum expenditure of ¥85.0 million. Results will be disclosed upon completion of the trading window. The order is valid only for that single trading session; execution is not guaranteed due to potential market conditions or order availability.
